title: Scalibur Adapter Params
description: A valid BidderParams object for the Scalibur adapter

placementId.description: Placement id, applied to imp.tagid. Optional: may instead be supplied per ad unit as imp.tagid. At least one source must resolve or the imp is not served.

host.description: Overrides the {{.Host}} macro in the endpoint. Bare host with an optional port only.
